name: Scan account and like first unliked
description: 指定アカウントの投稿を上から走査し未いいねの最初の投稿にいいねする（dryRunで検証可）

params.eval: (function(){ const posts = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('article')); for(const p of posts){ try{ const likeBtn = p.querySelector('div[data-testid="like"] button') || p.querySelector('button[aria-label*="Like"]'); if(!likeBtn) continue; const pressed = likeBtn.getAttribute('aria-pressed'); const liked = pressed==='true'; if(!liked){ return { didAction: true, postTitle: p.innerText.slice(0,120), selector: null, reason: 'found-unliked' }; } } catch(e){} } return { didAction: false, reason: 'no-unliked-found' }; })()
